candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Clear reported total for current assets.

candidates.why: Balance-sheet cash line; best match for cash and cash equivalents when no fuller BS label is present.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the year
candidates.why: Cash-flow ending balance, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

variables.notes: Selected balance-sheet cash line as the closest reported cash and cash equivalents measure.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.
Adjustment line, not the reported total.

variables.notes: Clear reported total for current liabilities.

candidates.why: Financing-related current liability row appearing in the current liabilities section; suitable for short-term debt.
Current borrowing line in the current liabilities section; suitable for short-term debt.
Potential borrowing line, but this exact label also appears in non-current liabilities, so it is ambiguous.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Bank Loans and Leases
candidates.why: Contains leases, which should be excluded from STD in the baseline definition.
Lease liability; explicitly excluded from STD baseline.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose the clean non-lease current debt labels visible in the current liabilities section. Manual review because duplicate/near-duplicate borrowing labels exist across periods, including an ambiguous lowercase 'Loans and borrowings' that also appears in non-current liabilities.

candidates.why: Closest match to taxes payable/current tax liabilities, but the same label also appears on the asset side, making it ambiguous.

variables.notes: R:nc. Selected 'Income Tax' as the likely current tax payable line in current liabilities, but the exact same label also appears under current assets, so this needs review.

candidates.why: Best reported total/net PPE-style line on the balance sheet under IFRS.
Only a component of PPE, not the total.

variables.notes: Preferred total tangible assets line as net PPE proxy.

candidates.why: Balancing-side total, not the asset-side total assets label.
Direct net cash flow from operating activities line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before financial items and tax
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before interest/tax effects, not the final net operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Selected the final reported operating cash flow line rather than the pre-financial-items-and-tax subtotal.
